enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ulle Vaa'?

'Ulle Vaa' celebrates the joy of cricket and teamwork, encouraging listeners to embrace the spirit of the game.

How does 'Ulle Vaa' fit into the plot of Chennai 28?

The song reflects the youthful exuberance and competitive spirit of the characters as they prepare for a cricket match.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Ulle Vaa'?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his energetic and catchy tunes.

When was 'Ulle Vaa' released?

'Ulle Vaa' was released on April 27, 2007, as part of the Chennai 28 soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Ulle Vaa' is a vibrant and energetic song that encapsulates the excitement of cricket and the camaraderie among friends. Set against the backdrop of the movie Chennai 28, it showcases the characters' passion for the game and their determination to win. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and motivation, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations and sports events. This song not only entertains but also inspires listeners to embrace their competitive spirit.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ulle Vaa from Chennai 28 is an electrifying anthem that captures the spirit of youth and cricket fever. With Yuvan's dynamic composition and engaging lyrics, this song is a perfect blend of fun and motivation. Get ready to feel the excitement as you dive into this vibrant celebration of sports and camaraderie!
stanzaMeanings: Chennai 600028
So come with compassion and love to play, get ready with the bat and ball, let's take a wicket and enjoy some cricket.
We represent the team with the best players, not just in batting but also in bowling, with speed and spin. We're going to win!
We're going to win the World Cup, come and join us. With legends like Sachin and Dravid, let's have fun together.
We can hit hard on the field, let's go to the ground together.
We're going to win the World Cup, come and join us. With legends like Sachin and Dravid, let's have fun together.
Chennai 600028
At Visalakshi Garden in R.A. Puram, the Royapuram Rockers are ready, let's go and enjoy the match.
Hey buddy, don't miss the one-day match, it's important for the World Cup, let's hurry up!
Oh no, I can't explain it, it's too exciting! Just look at our confidence!
Now we have tickets for the match, why are we waiting?
Don't complain, buddy, let's go to the beach and watch the test match on TV, the whole town is excited!
The excitement is high, and soon Sehwag and Dhoni will come to play!
If a spin ball is bowled, it will be a hit, and someone will come to coach us!
We can hit hard on the field, let's go to the ground together.
Some people are just making noise, looking around, but they don't understand the game.
Look at the stump, I will hit the ball, it will fly high, this is something new!
At home, home, home, it's like a match day for everyone!
When the breath is taken, the wicket will fall, let's hit hard!
Whatever happens, don't forget the shot, let's keep going!
We will do what we say, this is our area, welcome to Chennai 600028.
When the ball is bowled, will it be a no-ball? Let's see what happens!
Some love stories are like one-day matches, if you catch it, it's a win in cricket and life, always run for love!
We're going to win the World Cup, come and join us. With legends like Sachin and Dravid, let's have fun together.
We can hit hard on the field, let's go to the ground together.
We're going to win the World Cup, come and join us. With legends like Sachin and Dravid, let's have fun together.
It's not just a sport, it's my life, and I cherish it like my first love. To my Indian cricket team, we've always been the best, now it's time to beat the rest.
